sections.text: Since weâre making rapid changes to Protolabs Network that also impact the community, weâve written this letter to give more context as to why weâre transitioning from a peer-to-peer marketplace for 3D printing into a full-blown manufacturing platform. Since Protolabs Network was founded in 2013, the mission has been to build the worldâs largest distributed manufacturing network to create a faster and more sustainable way to source parts. We started out with 3D printing because it was the most accessible technology with machine costs rapidly decreasing and a minimum order quantity of 1.
